name: proofbot
description: Local-first AI asset provenance and timestamping on BOT Chain.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter ./packages/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter ./apps/web typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm test:config && pnpm contracts:test && pnpm web:test
scripts.build: pnpm contracts:compile && pnpm abi:export && pnpm --filter ./apps/web build
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
